requirements.expected_invariant: No merge before review, green CI, and cutoff gates.
requirements.exit_condition: Eligible PR has all required checks passing.

requirements.expected_invariant: Migrations and phase split are release-safe.
requirements.exit_condition: RFC #6933, rebase, performance/security notes, and phase split are complete.

requirements.expected_invariant: Release branch has no unresolved Electron conflict.
requirements.exit_condition: Rebase is clean and packaged evidence is attached.

requirements.expected_invariant: Merged change has no unexplained regression.
requirements.exit_condition: Residual failed shard is triaged or rerun by maintainer.
Current command evidence is recorded in the ledger.
Manifests are restored and the test passes.
Manifest is regenerated and the quality gate is green.

requirements.expected_invariant: The selected release manifest, OpenAPI info.version, and latest changelog release resolve to one valid semantic version while Unreleased remains the first changelog section.
requirements.exit_condition: The release contract has a stable manifest source, its regression passes, and the full docs-sync check reports no version mismatch.

requirements.expected_invariant: Every localized changelog contains required release headings as an ordered subsequence.
requirements.exit_condition: Regression coverage proves missing, reordered, or duplicate required release headings fail deterministically.

requirements.expected_invariant: Every localized mirror contains the required i18n preamble separator.
requirements.exit_condition: The regression and full checker reject a missing preamble separator.

requirements.expected_invariant: Every localized changelog has nonempty meaningful translated content after excluding headings, navigation, and TBD placeholders.
requirements.exit_condition: The deterministic content check replaces the current relative-size heuristic and its regressions pass.

requirements.expected_invariant: Every locale configured in config/i18n.json has required documentation mirrors, and any additional on-disk locale remains validated.
requirements.exit_condition: Configured-locale enumeration is covered by regression tests and the mirror-scoped check passes.

requirements.expected_invariant: The Finnish llm.txt mirror exists and its body exactly matches the canonical root llm.txt.
requirements.exit_condition: docs/i18n/fi/llm.txt is restored and both mirror-scoped and full docs-sync checks pass.
